# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
class Dashboard {

    private $pdo;

    public function __construct() {
        $host = 'localhost';
        $db   = 'my_database';
        $user = 'username';
        $pass = 'password';
        $charset = 'utf8mb4';

        $dsn = "mysql:host=$host;dbname=$db;charset=$charset";
        $this->pdo = new PDO($dsn, $user, $pass);
    }

    public function generateReport() {
       $sql = "SELECT * FROM `report_table` WHERE 1 ";

       if (isset($_POST['status']) && !empty(trim($_POST['status']))) {
           $status = $_POST['status'];
           $sql .= "AND `status` = :status ";
       }

       if (isset($_POST['category']) && !empty(trim($_POST['category']))) {
           $category = $_POST['category'];
           $sql .= "AND `category` = :category ";
       }

       if (isset($_POST['startDate']) && isset($_POST['endDate']) && !empty(trim($_POST['startDate'])) && !empty(trim($_POST['endDate']))) {
           $startDate = $_POST['startDate'];
           $endDate = $_POST['endDate'];
           $sql .= "AND `date` BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date ";
       }

       $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);

       if (strpos($sql, ':status') !== false) {
           $stmt->bindParam(':status', $status);
       }

       if (strpos($sql, ':category') !== false) {
           $stmt->bindParam(':category', $category);
       }

       if (strpos($sql, ':start_date') !== false && strpos($sql, ':end_date') !== false) {
           $stmt->bindParam(':start_date', $startDate);
           $stmt->bindParam(':end_date', $endDate);
       }

       $stmt->execute();

       return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    }
}

$dashboard = new Dashboard();
$report = $dashboard->generateReport();

// Output result
foreach ($report as $row) {
    // Handle output
}
?>
